workstreams.gate_review_notes: Review CRESTv2-P1-WS12-REVIEW-001 accepted 2026-06-27. Status is blocked_on WS-3, not provisional_complete — referential re-validation cannot run until WS-3 key normalization + enforcement gate land. F3/F4/F5/F6 are accepted as findings but not closed until verified against live PG — this acceptance was written against DoD file while DB was down. Re-confirm counts at source as part of WS-3.

F2.resolve_by: Fold into WS-3 key normalization (TKT-0344 scope). Canonicalize to lowercase, de-dupe case-split edges, re-index. Re-confirm counts at PG source.

F3 (CHG denominator) reconfirmed at PG source post case-fix. Execute WS-3 in order: TKT-0344 (with case norm) → TKT-0348 → TKT-0354 → TKT-0359.

gate_review_01.notes: All 8 findings accepted as valid. None closed until verified against live PG. F7 resolution: verify against Notion permanently. Tracker is the suspect, not the witness — same as DoD file was suspect in WS-1/WS-2 close. Re-confirm F2/F3 counts at PG source as part of WS-3. Return F5 diff (84 stubs vs source bodies). Report F7 audit result. Everything else proceed.

notes: CRESTv2-P1-WS12-REVIEW-001 processed 2026-06-27. WS-1/WS-2 status=blocked (blocked_by: WS-3) — dependency is machine visible. TKT-0359 re-opened — tracker lied (had as done when Notion=Backlog). F7 closure evidence: Notion state + enforcement gate test only. Tracker is inadmissible. F2 case normalization folded into TKT-0344 scope. WS-1/WS-2 will close together on referential evidence after WS-3 lands, not before. F5 diff and F7 audit results to be appended to this tracker on completion.
